raw_comment:
Hi im Pedro and this is me for a school project sharing my opinion (im 14)
What do you notice? Honestly its expected i can't say i notice too much that blows my mind. my mother is wanting badly to move to florida and im not able to partly for past memories but also i need to stay with my grandparents and when they're gone im going to florida so i can be with my father figure and being 3000 miles away give or take makes it definitely expected that i wont be able to call or visit her 24/7 or even anywhere near that 
How does this relate to you and your community? it shows that this might be part of the reason people either say they are or are diagnosed with depression because their parents are a huge part of life and you honestly should call them everyday and at least say you love them, life is fast don't let it catch up to you
Create a catchy headline that captures the graph’s main idea.
The Parental extinction is among us its starting with cutting communication.
ace_sentences: Pedro does not notice too much.
Pedro's mother wants badly to move to florida.
Pedro is not able to move to florida partly for past memories.
Pedro needs to stay with his grandparents.
Pedro will go to florida when his grandparents are gone.
Pedro can be with his father figure in florida.
Pedro is 3000 miles away give or take.
Pedro will not be able to call or visit his mother 24/7.
This might be part of the reason people say they are diagnosed with depression.
Parents are a huge part of life.
You should at least say you love them.
The headline is the Parental extinction is among us its starting with cutting communication.
